name: dochub-aux-ipad
description: Thin Capacitor iPad shell that loads the live DocHub app for the aux-display second-screen feature.

scripts.prepare:www: mkdir -p www && printf '<!doctype html><meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=https://dochub.pcc2k.com">' > www/index.html
scripts.add:ios: npm run prepare:www && npx cap add ios
